'''Kamsul''' was one of seven inhabited [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Stenness Node|Stenness System]].<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
